warnings.description: Belief inventory uses surface_beliefs/implicit_beliefs/limiting_beliefs/conversion_requirements taxonomy instead of the standard E5 WHY/WHAT/WHO/HOW categories. The content substantively covers all four belief dimensions, but the structural format differs from the canonical E5 template. This does not block Layer 3 synthesis but may require the Layer 3 agent to map belief categories to WHY/WHAT/WHO/HOW during transsubstantiation.

summary: All 5 validation checks pass. Layer 2 Intelligence outputs are complete, coherent, and sufficient to support Layer 3 synthesis. The corpus of 1,442 quotes analyzed across 14 files produces 7 master themes (each with 6-8 supporting patterns), 67 mechanisms cataloged (13 competitor + 12 implied + untapped), 8 competitors analyzed, 47 beliefs mapped, 12 villains identified, 20 opportunity gaps found, market sophistication determined at Stage 4, awareness distribution calculated across 5 levels, and 6-dimension Now-After transformation grid fully populated. All analyses converge on the same core narrative without contradictions. One minor warning on belief taxonomy format does not affect synthesis readiness.

check_1_e5_completeness.web_analysis: primary_web defined with 12 characteristics, 8 exclusions, 3 secondary WEBs
check_1_e5_completeness.belief_analysis: 47 beliefs across 4 layers (surface: 12, implicit: 10, limiting: 12, conversion: 13). WARNING: uses surface/implicit/limiting/conversion taxonomy instead of WHY/WHAT/WHO/HOW
check_1_e5_completeness.now_after_grid: 6/6 dimensions populated (feeling, thinking, doing, having, experiencing, being)
check_1_e5_completeness.awareness_map: 5-level distribution calculated (Unaware 3%, Problem-Aware 32%, Solution-Aware 38%, Product-Aware 26%, Most-Aware 1%)

check_2_pattern_quality.quote_coverage: 1,442 quotes with specific IDs throughout all analyses
check_2_pattern_quality.theme_distinctness: 7 non-overlapping themes covering face control, confidence, identity, carousel, ZT debate, equipment intelligence, trust

check_5_synthesis_coherence.market_narrative: Clear — Stage 4 market, ZT commoditizing, forward weighting as next-gen mechanism
check_5_synthesis_coherence.strategic_direction: Actionable with messaging hooks, awareness targets, competitive positioning
